property.name: cardTitle
property.label: Card Title
property.description: Title displayed at the top of the component

property.name: accentColor
property.label: Accent Color
property.description: Primary accent color for charts and links

property.name: lineChartColor
property.label: Line Chart Color
property.description: Color for the Engagement Over Time line chart

property.name: barChartColor
property.label: Bar Chart Color
property.description: Color for the campaign bar chart

property.name: assetBarColor
property.label: Asset Bar Color
property.description: Color for the asset bar chart
